title: libpod/oci.go: Perf issue
body:
Matt Heon and I found that a defer statement was costing podman
run dearly.  We dont think the defer function was working (nor
needed) and was timing out as well.  Removing this defer statement
decreased podman runtime by 1.5s or more.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@runcom @mrunalp Ping. This is originally CRI-O code (and it's still in CRI-O). We found removing this made container creation ~1.5 seconds faster, and the comment says it is unused - does this sound correct?

If so, we might want to PR handling for this into CRI-O as well.
We removed that in cri-o long time ago actually https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/blob/master/oci/oci.go#L235

@runcom Cool, thanks
LGTM then. Let's kill this dead.

:pushpin: Commit 950a619 has been approved by `baude`
